findings.title: Proof receipt omits command transcripts for required proof rows
findings.rationale: The review bundle puts four executable verification rows under review, and the spec states that RECEIPTS/ stores proof output and command transcripts. The cited receipt only lists the commands at lines 17-21; it does not capture pass/fail status, stdout/stderr, timestamps, or any transcript showing those proof rows actually ran. A frozen reviewer therefore cannot verify the required proof from the submitted evidence alone, even though the skill and doc surfaces themselves appear aligned with the intended loop contract.
findings.suggested_next_action: Repair the receipt by adding captured outputs or durable pass/fail transcripts for the listed test, fmt, and validate commands, then rerun the local spec/evidence review.
